raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta Kehnixa Wahrds
makfaja wairak ne ka Joaba
Wahrds/ un to Karra-Wirf-
neeku. Ta igahje Joabs ar
teem Karra-Wirfneeekeem no ta
Kehnixa / tohs Israëta Landis
staitht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee gahje pahr to Jar-
dann/ un apmettehs Aroëra pa
labbas Rohkas ta Pilsfahta/ kas
tahs Uppes Gada Widdii gull/
un pee Jaëfeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz nahze tee us Gilea-
du/ un us to letjas Semmi Ka-
dsi/ tee nahze arr us Dan Ja-
amu/ un apkahrt us Zihdonu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahze us to Stip-
rumu no Tirus/ un us wissem
Eewiteru un Kananiteru Pils-
fahteem/ un tee nahze Juhdat
prett Deenas-Widdu ahra uhs
Versebu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta gahje tee apkahrt zaar
wisfu Semmi/ un nahze pehz
dewin Mehnescheem un dividef-
mits Deenahm uhs Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joabs dewe to Lauschu
usrafstitu Pulku tam Kehnixam/
un eeksch Israëta bija afconfinuts
reisi tuhkfioschi stipri Wihri/ kas
to Sohbinu iswilke/ un to Wih-
ru no Juhda peeefinuts reisi
tuhkfioscht Wihrf.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad trihzeja Dahwidam
ta Sirde/ ka winch tohs Lan-
dis bij staithjs. Un Dahwids faz-
zija us to KUNGU: Es etim
tohti grehkojs ar to/ ko es efimu
darrtjs/un uu KUNGS/atnein/
luhdsans / tawa Kalpa Nosee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu Dahwids Ri
zehlehs/ tad notikfe ta KUNG
Wahrds us to Praweetu Ga
Dahwida Redsetaju/ fazzida
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Etj/ un runna us Dah
du: Ta fakka tas KUNG
Trihs Leetas turru es tew pr
scha/ iswehle tew weenu notah
ko es tew darrischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Gads nahze pee D
wida/ un dewe winnam Sin-
un fazzija us to: Gribbi tu
tix Gaddus Badda Laiku ce
tawas Semmes? Jeb gribbi
trihs Mehneschus preefsch
weem Eenatdneekeem behgt/
tew wajahs? jeb gribbt tu /
trihs Deenas Mehris ta
Semmê nahk? nemun nu w
rá / un peeraugt / ko es atta
schu tam/ kas manni fuhtijs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Dahwids
Gadu: Man irr fohti bail.
krittischu labbis tam KUNG
Rohká/ jo winna Schehlastil
irr leelas/ bet eekch Zilweku R
ku ue gribbn es krisf.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad likke tas KUNG
Mehri nahkt eekch Israëta /
Rihta lihds tam nospreest
Laikain/ un no tecin Laudim
mirre no Dannas lihds Verseb
septindeefmits tuhkfioschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas Engelis fa
Rohku pahr Jerusalemi isse-
winnu nomaitaht/ tad bija t
RUNGAN tas Launu
ichehl/ un fazzija us to Eng
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
